name: Twang
author: Poki
description: Twang is a puzzle platform game made by Nitrome. Use the strings of the level to bounce your character to the end of the level. Watch out for the lava ! Will you be able to reach the end of each level ? How to play: Controls are explained in-game About the creator: This game was created by Nitrome as a flash game, and later emulated in HTML5 by AwayFL for Poki. Play Nitrome's other flash games on Poki: Swindler 2 , Avalanche , Cave Chaos 2 , Enemy 585 , Silly Sausage , Swindler , Coil , Cold Storage , Twin Shot 2 , Bad Ice-Cream , Bad Ice-Cream 2 , Bad Ice-Cream 3 , Cave Chaos , Mutiny , Skywire , Twin Shot , Test Subject Green and Test Subject Blue
